- Trend: **GROWTH** (+24% daily click rate, +57% daily impression rate vs prior period)

- Quick win candidates: 4 (Tier 1: 0, Tier 2: 1, Tier 3: 3)
- High-impression low-CTR pages: 2 (urgent: 0, needs attention: 2)
- DR: 0.0 | Organic keywords (Ahrefs): 35 | Est. monthly traffic: 12
- Backlink health: **CRITICAL** — 100% spam rate (10/10 links), disavow recommended

## A. Quick Wins
*Criteria: GSC position 4–20 AND impressions ≥ 5 (period: Mar 6–Apr 3)*
*Priority score = impressions × position_weight (pos 4–10: ×1.5, pos 11–15: ×1.0, pos 16–20: ×0.6)*

| Rank | Keyword | Position | Impressions | Clicks | CTR% | Score | URL | Revenue Tier |

*Note: Only 10 total GSC keywords returned — early-stage indexing. "claude 英会話" CTR is already strong (40%); not a CTR priority.*

## B. High-Impression Low-CTR Pages
*Criteria: impressions ≥ 20 | Expected CTR: pos 1–3=15%, 4–6=5%, 7–10=2%, 11–20=0.5%*
*CTR gap = (expected − actual) / expected | ≥0.8 = URGENT, ≥0.5 = needs attention*

| Page | Position | Impressions | Actual CTR | Expected CTR | CTR Gap | Status |
|------|----------|-------------|------------|--------------|---------|--------|
| /real-phrases/not-gonna-lie/ | 9.85 | 159 | 0.63% | 2.0% | 0.69 | **needs attention** |
| /real-phrases/catch-you-later/ | 9.30 | 129 | 0.78% | 2.0% | 0.61 | **needs attention** |
| /real-phrases/that-hits-different/ | 9.43 | 92 | 1.09% | 2.0% | 0.46 | monitor |
| /real-phrases/my-bad/ | 15.69 | 35 | 2.86% | 0.5% | −4.7 | OK (beats expected) |
| /articles/ai-english-conversation-practice/ | 7.95 | 20 | 25.0% | 2.0% | −11.5 | OK (beats expected) |

*All three /real-phrases/ pages cluster around pos 9–10 with CTR far below the 2% benchmark. Title + meta description rewrite is the clear lever.*

All 10 returned backlinks are flagged as spam (domain or anchor contains: seo, backlink, rank, boost, buy):

| **Change** | — | +8.3% raw | +37.7% raw | **+23.7%** | **+57.4%** |

## I. Competitor Overview
*Source: Ahrefs organic competitors, country: JP*

| Rank | Competitor | Common KWs | Their Total KWs | Their Traffic |
|------|-----------|------------|-----------------|---------------|
| 1 | alc.co.jp | 19 | 295,291 | 3,498,506 |
| 2 | courrier.jp | 7 | 25,434 | 155,574 |
| 3 | amazingtalker.com | 3 | 15,441 | 185,633 |
| 4 | discoveringsounds.com | 3 | 4,752 | 39,416 |
| 5 | beigo-n-life.com | 2 | 264 | 1,247 |

**Key insights:**
- alc.co.jp dominates the /real-phrases/ keyword space — direct competition unrealistic at DR 0
- discoveringsounds.com (4,752 kw, 39k traffic) is the closest comparable peer — study their content angle
- beigo-n-life.com (264 kw, 1,247 traffic) is at a similar early stage — useful growth benchmark

## Top 5 Priority Actions

| # | Phase | Action (specific) | Est. click increase/mo | Revenue Tier | Effort | Basis |
|---|-------|-------------------|------------------------|--------------|--------|-------|
| 1 | 基盤 | /real-phrases/not-gonna-lie/ のtitleを「Not gonna lie の意味・使い方｜ネイティブ例文つき」形式にリライト＋meta descriptionに「日本語で言うと？皮肉・本音の両方の用法を例文で解説」を追加 | +4–6/月 | Tier 3 | small | 159 imp・pos 9.85・CTR 0.63%（期待値2%）・CTRギャップ 0.69 |
| 2 | 基盤 | /real-phrases/catch-you-later/ のtitle/meta descriptionリライト（「キャッチ・ユー・レイター 意味｜また後で？の返し方・使い方」等、カタカナ読み訴求） | +3–4/月 | Tier 3 | small | 129 imp・pos 9.30・CTR 0.78%（期待値2%）・CTRギャップ 0.61 |
| 3 | 最適化 | /real-phrases/good-for-you/ のコンテンツ拡充（褒め・皮肉・自己肯定の3用法、例文6件以上、FAQ追加）でpos 18→10以内へ | +8–15/月 | Tier 3 | medium | vol 1,300・pos 18（ページ1目前）・opp score 1,300 |
| 4 | 最適化 | /real-phrases/take-care/ のコンテンツ拡充（別れ際・メール締め・ビジネス用途別例文、"take care of yourself" との違い）でpos 25→15以内へ | +20–35/月 | Tier 3 | medium | vol 4,500（最大ボリューム）・pos 25・opp score 3,150 |
| 5 | 継続 | Googleサーチコンソールにdisavowファイルを更新・再提出（新規確認分: seoexpress.org, itxoft-seo-for-modern-business.site を docs/disavow.txt に追記してアップロード） | ペナルティリスク排除 | 全Tier | small | スパムリンク率100%・DRインフレ疑い・リンクファームネットワーク確認 |
